action_definition.edge_measure: unique unordered vertex pairs co-occurring in any Freudenthal tetrahedron

checks.name: the canonical AP-E6 continuum seed has the frozen checksum
the subtracted logarithmic barrier is nonnegative, vacuum-flat, convex, and divergent at the floor
pairwise admissibility gives a uniform no-zero bound for normalized affine interpolation
the full AP-E8 chart gradient agrees with a centred directional derivative
the optimizer-only invalid-domain continuation returns a derivative consistent with its energy
the intrinsic barrier second variation agrees with a centred geodesic second difference
every main final field is unanchored, admissible, three-target B=1, and stationary by the direct tangent test
the fixed-box sequence contains four independently re-relaxed spacings
the fixed-spacing L=6,8,10 sequence is stationary with controlled finite-volume energy spread
nearby gamma and epsilon choices retain admissible unanchored B=1 stationary representatives
a deterministic tangent-plus-scalar perturbation returns to a numerically indistinguishable same-energy admissible stationary B=1 representative
the barrier has a stable approximately quadratic power on a compact-supported boundary-compatible profile
the exact vacuum has zero barrier and B=0

proof_contract.continuum_boundary: the theorem supplies finite-grid minimizers indexed by a; it gives neither equicoercivity nor convergence of those minimizers
proof_contract.finite_grid_existence: compact n-space plus coercive m_s>0 breathing potential and barrier-bounded sublevels yield an interior minimizer in every nonempty admissible component
proof_contract.grid_sequence_nonemptiness: sampling a smooth compactly supported degree-one continuum field gives pair dots>epsilon on every sufficiently fine grid by uniform continuity
proof_contract.sector_preservation: all six pair dots in every tetrahedron exceed epsilon, so the normalized affine map has norm at least sqrt((1+3 epsilon)/4); its degree is locally constant and the barrier forbids a finite-energy crossing

smooth_compact_supported_profile_barrier.profile: C2 degree-one hedgehog with support radius 2 inside the L=6 box and exact vacuum boundary
smooth_compact_supported_profile_barrier.scope: fixed compact-supported boundary-compatible test field only; not a uniform bound on minimizers

topology.method: Freudenthal tetrahedra plus normalized-affine regular-value preimage count
